data.name: Sticky Honey
data.detailed_description:
Three different girls!

Do you prefer crazy Wasp or innocent Worker Bee? Or maybe you'll try elegant Queen Bee?

Several fetishes and positions!

Includes: clothed sex, vaginal or anal sex in cowgirl, from behind, full nelson, sideways, and missionary positions, handjob, choking.

Fulfill your honeyfuck fantasy!

Characters designed with attention to details - antennae, abdomens and wings! Clothes design inspired by real-life insects!

Dynamic Context CGs!

Most of 6 sex scenes has multiple variations depending on scene progression.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 256 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 256 MB 可用空間
